sample_texts: $BTC 2026 Bull Run Outlook: Feb Bear trap, Mar Breakout, Apr Altseason, May New ATH near $215K, Jun Bull trap, Jul Liquidation cascade, Aug Bear market begins.
Bitcoin just entered the final Bull Trap of 2026. It's the EXACT repeat of the 2022 bear market, and $BTC will dump to $35,000 in March.
